ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of race (e.g., NH Flat, Chase, Hurdle) */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course where the race was held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the race was held */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* The length of the race in meters or furlongs */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* The total prize money for the race */,
  "number_of_horses" INTEGER /* The number of horses that started the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* The condition of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "race_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "minimum_age" INTEGER /* The minimum age of horses allowed in the race type */,
  "maximum_age" INTEGER /* The maximum age of horses allowed in the race type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Additional criteria for horses to be eligible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* The type of track */,
  "track_length" INTEGER /* The length of the track in meters or furlongs */,
  "number_of_bends" INTEGER /* The number of bends on the track */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* The surface of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer of the horse */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The birth date of the horse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* The breed of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* The color of the horse */,
  "sire" TEXT /* The father of the horse */,
  "dam" TEXT /* The mother of the horse */,
  "previous_owners" TEXT /* A list of previous owners of the horse */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* The current health status of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "number_of_horses" INTEGER /* The number of horses owned by the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trainer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the trainer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "number_of_horses" INTEGER /* The number of horses trained by the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the horse in the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* The time taken by the horse to complete the race */,
  "speed" TEXT /* The average speed of the horse in the race */,
  "distance_covered" INTEGER /* The total distance covered by the horse in the race */,
  "odds" TEXT /* The betting odds for the horse in the race */,
  "purse" TEXT /* The prize money won by the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of race */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of starts */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "seconds" INTEGER /* Number of second-place finishes */,
  "thirds" INTEGER /* Number of third-place finishes */,
  "average_start_position" TEXT /* The average starting position of the horse in races */,
  "average_finish_position" TEXT /* The average finishing position of the horse in races */,
  "best_time" TEXT /* The best time recorded by the horse */,
  "worst_time" TEXT /* The worst time recorded by the horse */,
  "number_of_top_3_finishes" INTEGER /* The total number of top 3 finishes */,
  "number_of_top_5_finishes" INTEGER /* The total number of top 5 finishes */,
  "earnings" TEXT /* The total earnings from races */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jockey */,
  "odds" TEXT /* The betting odds for the horse in the race */,
  "starting_position" INTEGER /* The starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "weight" TEXT /* The weight carried by the horse in the race */,
  "handicap_rating" INTEGER /* The handicap rating of the horse in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the jockey */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the jockey */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the jockey */,
  "number_of_races" INTEGER /* The total number of races the jockey has participated in */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* The total number of wins the jockey has achieved */,
  "number_of_top_3_finishes" INTEGER /* The total number of top 3 finishes the jockey has achieved */,
  "earnings" TEXT /* The total earnings of the jockey from races */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, trainer, racing official, analyst) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
